title: Another day, another launch. OpenAI announces new o3 models
description: the company unveiled o3, the successor to the o1 “reasoning” model it released earlier in the year. o3 is a model family, to be more precise — as was the case with o1. There’s o3 and o3-mini, a smaller, distilled model fine-tuned for particular tasks.

title: OpenAI brings ChatGPT to your landline (1-800-CHATGPT)

title: ChatGPT and Sora are down.
